name: Marriott Bonvoy Boundless Credit Card
perks: 6x Marriott Bonvoy points at hotels in the Marriott portfolio
3x points on first $6,000 in combined dining, grocery, and gas station purchases per year
Free annual night award certificate (up to 35,000 points) each account anniversary
Automatic Silver Elite status (plus path to Gold at 25 stays)
100,000 bonus points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months
Complimentary premium in-room WiFi at Marriott properties
drawbacks: Marriott points worth less per point than many competitors
Award category creep has reduced value in recent years
Free night certificate capped at 35,000 points (limits use at top tier properties)
